implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for RollCall: Students must be able to view their own attendance records, enhancing transparency in attendance tracking.
The system shall ensure efficiency (resource utilization): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
